text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 89 

ER_CHRG_AMT 

LABEL: Emergency Room (ER) Charge Amount ($) 

DESCRIPTION: The charge amount (rounded to whole dollars) for emergency room (ER) services provided during the 
beneficiary's stay. 

SHORT NAME: ER_AMT 

LONG NAME: ER_CHRG_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field is derived by accumulating the revenue center total charge amount
